title: salix × recognita
intro: Salix × recognita, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between two species of the willow tree (Salix spp.), specifically the Salix alba and Salix fragilis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Salix × recognita include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Salix × recognita can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and has been used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
